description.content: Movie Inventory CRUD operations routed through API Gateway to Inventory API (HTTP Proxy pattern)

Create a new movie in the inventory.

Required fields:
- title
- genre
- release_year

Optional fields:
- description
- rating
- duration
- available_copies

body.raw:
{
  "title": "{{movieTitle}}",
  "description": "A mind-bending thriller about dreams within dreams",
  "genre": "{{movieGenre}}",
  "release_year": {{movieYear}},
  "rating": {{movieRating}},
  "duration": 148,
  "available_copies": 5
}

description.content:
Complete test collection for CRUD Master microservices architecture.

Includes:
- Movie Inventory API (CRUD operations)
- Billing API (Order processing via RabbitMQ)
- Health checks

Automated tests validate response schemas, status codes, and data integrity.
